evals.prompt: Please evaluate the alignment between the current code and the requirements in product-spec-context.md. The specification document is in the project root directory, and there are uncommitted changes in git.
evals.expected_output: Generate a structured evaluation report, overwriting the 9. Evaluation Report section in product-spec-context.md, including: requirement compliance overview (at least identifying partially implemented items), code issue list, optimization suggestions, and comprehensive conclusion
expectations: Evaluation report overwrites the 9.* section in product-spec-context.md, not appended at the bottom
Identify the status of each requirement (Passed/Partial/Failed/Unevaluable) with corresponding code locations
Identify at least 1 code issue (requirement deviation or quality defect) with file path and line number
Provide at least 1 actionable optimization suggestion with priority annotation (P0/P1/P2)
Comprehensive conclusion paragraph summarizes overall implementation quality

evals.prompt: I just completed the first round of implementation. Please help me audit the code, check the completion quality of all requirements in product-spec-context.md, and point out areas that need optimization.
evals.expected_output: Complete audit report including quality review dimension assessment (correctness, robustness, maintainability, performance risks), and specific code improvement suggestions
expectations: Evaluation report covers all specification requirements with no omissions
Annotate severity level for each code quality issue (P0/P1/P2)
Quality review covers at least 3 dimensions (any from correctness, robustness, maintainability, performance, security)
All issues and suggestions specify file paths, referencing 8.1 main index or 8.3 incremental index
When missing error handling is found in code, record it in the issue list

evals.prompt: Please run the evaluator to audit whether the current implementation is consistent with the specification document.
evals.expected_output: When git diff is empty, automatically fall back to the most recent commit changes for review, and generate an evaluation report
expectations: When git diff is empty, automatically retrieve the most recent commit changes
Evaluation report specifies the change source (commit hash)
Still overwrite the evaluation report in the full 9.* section format
